code:
import io
import string
import list

fn contains_str(_ xs: List<String>, _ target: String) -> Bool
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  while i < xs.len()
    let item = xs.get(i)
    match item
    when Some(s)
      if s == target
        found = true
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut seen: List<String> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok_opt = tokens.get(i)
    match tok_opt
    when Some(tok)
      if not contains_str(seen, tok)
        seen = list.push(seen, tok)
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("unique=#{seen.len()}")
end
